---
title: "Rāg Rāmkalī"
subtitle: "*Pyālā mujhe bhari*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Acapala &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Tintāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> pyālā mujhe bhari de re matavāri morā<br>bīta gailī sagarī raina bhailī bhora

**Antarā**

> hama tuma pive chakāi chakāve<br>durajana loga dekha jare karahi śora

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Tintāl is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, tali **2** at beat 5, khālī **O** at beat 9, and tali **3** at beat 13.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | $\lb{\mathrm{dd}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{Pm}}$ | P | $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | m | m | P | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **pyā** | **-** | **-** | **lā** | **-** | **mu** | **jhe** | **bha** | **ri** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | - | d | P | - | $\lb{\mathrm{mP}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{dP}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{mP}}$ | m | G | m | m | P | P | - |
| **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **re** | **-** | **pyā** | **-** | **-** | **lā** | **-** | **mu** | **jhe** | **bha** | **ri** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{n}}\mathrm{d}}$ | - | - | d | P | - | - | - | m | m | G | - | - | - | $\lb{\mathrm{mP}}$ | m |
| **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **re** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ma** | **ta** | **vā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ri** |
| G | - | r | - | - | - | S | - | - | $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{mG}}$ | m | P | - | P | - |
| **mo** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **bī** | **ta** | **ga** | **i** | **-** | **lī** | **-** |
| - | d | d | d | $\lb{\mathrm{dN}}$ | d | P | - | d | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{r}}\tr{\mathrm{r}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **-** | **sa** | **ga** | **rī** | **rai** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **bha** | **i** | **lī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | d | - | - | P | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **bho** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\lb{\mathrm{dd}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{dd}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{r}}\tr{\mathrm{r}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{dd}}$ | N | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{r}}\tr{\mathrm{r}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}-}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | N |
| **hama** | **tuma** | **pi** | **ve** | **chakā** | **i cha** | **kā** | **ve** | **dura** | **jana** | **lo** | **ga de** | **kha** | **-** | **-** | **ja** |
| d | P | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **-** | **re** | **kara** | **hi** | **śo** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
